title: keteleeria davidiana var. davidiana
intro: Keteleeria davidiana var. davidiana, also known as Chinese fir, is a species of coniferous tree native to China. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Keteleeria davidiana var. davidiana include reducing fever, relieving pain, and soothing coughs, as well as its potential to lower blood pressure and improve cardiovascular health. Herbal preparations of Keteleeria davidiana var. davidiana include teas and infusions, which can be made by steeping the leaves or bark in hot water.
